title: posttenantsregistershouldregisternewtenant
description: Verify that the POST /tenants/register endpoint successfully registers a new tenant with valid data and returns the appropriate success response.

title: postauthtokenoidccallbackshouldexchangecodeforjwt
description: Verify that the POST /auth/token (OIDC callback) endpoint correctly exchanges the authorization code for a JWT token and handles errors for invalid or expired codes.

title: getapiv1accountsshouldreturnaccountlist
description: Verify that the GET /api/v1/accounts endpoint returns a list of enterprise accounts accessible to the authenticated user.

title: postapiv1accountsshouldcreateaccount
description: Verify that the POST /api/v1/accounts endpoint creates a new enterprise account with valid input and returns the created account details.

title: getapiv1intelligencesignalsshouldreturnaccountsignals
description: Verify that the GET /api/v1/intelligence/signals endpoint returns intelligence signals data scoped to the specified account.

title: getapiv1driversaccountidshouldreturndrivertree
description: Verify that the GET /api/v1/drivers/:accountId endpoint returns the driver tree data for the specified account.

title: putapiv1driversaccountidshouldupdatedrivertree
description: Verify that the PUT /api/v1/drivers/:accountId endpoint updates the driver tree data for the specified account and returns the updated model.

title: getapiv1calculatorroishouldreturnroicalculations
description: Verify that the GET /api/v1/calculator/roi endpoint returns ROI calculation results based on the provided financial inputs for the account.

title: postapiv1calculatorcalculateshouldperformcalculations
description: Verify that the POST /api/v1/calculator/calculate endpoint performs ROI and value model calculations with given parameters and returns accurate results.

title: getapiv1deliverablescasesshouldreturnbusinesscases
description: Verify that the GET /api/v1/deliverables/cases endpoint returns a list of business cases accessible to the user.
